title: Create auto-sync tickets hook (SessionStart)
description: Implement `auto-sync.json` hook that fires on SessionStart and runs `python3 tickets.py --sync` automatically before any agent session begins. This ensures dependency resolution and READY-state promotion happen without requiring operators to manually run sync commands. The hook should execute as a shell command hook, capture stdout/stderr, and surface any sync errors to the agent session context. This replaces the step in `.github/instructions/agent-behavior.instructions.md` section 10 that requires `python3 tickets.py --sync` before work — making it deterministic and automatic.
acceptance_criteria: Given `auto-sync.json` exists in `.github/hooks/`, when any agent session starts via VS Code, then `python3 tickets.py --sync` runs automatically
Given `tickets.py --sync` executes, when new tickets become unblocked, then they are moved to READY before the first agent tool call
Given the hook fires on SessionStart, when sync completes successfully, then the session continues without blocking
Given the hook encounters an error (e.g., Python not found), when sync fails, then the error is surfaced in the session output and the session is not silently blocked
Given the hook script exists at `.github/hooks/scripts/auto-sync-tickets.sh`, when executed, then it runs tickets.py from the workspace root

history.details: Ticket created from TODO/tasks/L2-vscode-copilot-improvements.md — gap identified in L2-02-D: auto-sync hook not covered by existing tickets
